vulnerability.reference: Translation disrupts watermark patterns and detection tools lack multilingual calibration.
vulnerability.generated: Content moderators’ watermark detectors lack cross-lingual robustness, so translation removes watermarks and renders machine-generated text undetectable.

impact.reference: Undetected AI-generated disinformation spreads in non-English communities, eroding media trust.
impact.generated: Malicious actors disseminate undetectable LLM-generated disinformation across languages, bypassing moderation and undermining information integrity.

dose_response.reference: Watermark susceptibility to translation attacks enables evasion when content moderators detect translated text, which, through monolingual detection gaps, leads to undetected AI-generated disinformation eroding trust in non-English media.
dose_response.generated: Watermarking for LLM-generated text is susceptible to adaptive black-box removal attacks; through moderators using detectors on translated text, triggers cross-lingual robustness lack where translation removes watermarks, leading to undetectable disinformation across languages bypassing moderation undermining information integrity.
